name: Agent discovery via MCP list_meta_agents
input: I need to find an agent that can review code quality

expectedDiscovery.scoring: capability description matching (0-3), not name matching

passFailCriteria.PASS: meta-prism discovered via capability matching; list_meta_agents called; no hardcoded agent name
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Agent hardcoded by name without search; list_meta_agents not used

name: Skill discovery via 5-step chain
input: Find me a skill for testing Python code

expectedDiscovery.method: 5-step chain: local -> index -> findskill -> expert -> generic
expectedDiscovery.scoring: ROI formula: (Task Coverage × Frequency) / (Context Cost + Learning Curve)

passFailCriteria.PASS: All 5 steps documented; ROI calculated; best-fit skill selected; findskill called if local insufficient
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Single-step discovery; ROI not calculated; wrong skill selected

name: MCP tool discovery
input: I need to execute some code in a sandboxed environment

passFailCriteria.PASS: MCP tools scanned; mcp__ide__executeCode considered; permissions checked
passFailCriteria.FAIL: MCP tools not discovered; tool not considered despite availability

name: Command/script discovery
input: Run the validation suite to check if everything is wired correctly

passFailCriteria.PASS: package.json scanned; validate/test scripts discovered and used
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Scripts not scanned; hardcoded npm commands without discovery

name: Memory recall via Librarian
input: Did we handle similar JWT auth issues before?

expectedDiscovery.expectedMemory: prior JWT auth implementations or patterns

passFailCriteria.PASS: sqlite-vec queried; related memories retrieved; Librarian invoked
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Memory not consulted; past patterns ignored

name: Knowledge Graph via graphify
input: What modules depend on the auth module?

expectedDiscovery.expectedGraph: dependency graph with auth as center

passFailCriteria.PASS: graphify-out/graph.json detected; subgraph extracted for auth; nodes/edges returned
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Graph not detected; raw file reading instead of graph query

name: Cross-platform capability discovery
input: Find me a blockchain security expert from anywhere

passFailCriteria.PASS: discover-global-capabilities.mjs executed; blockchain-developer discovered from global index; cross-platform fallback used
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Only local capabilities scanned; external platforms ignored

name: DRY conflict detection
input: Find me a skill for auth testing — we already have python-testing

passFailCriteria.PASS: DRY overlap detected (>50%); existing python-testing recommended for auth; duplicate rejected or merged
passFailCriteria.FAIL: New auth-testing skill created despite python-testing covering it; DRY violation

name: Capability gap detection and logging
input: I need an agent that can audit Kubernetes manifests

expectedDiscovery.method: exhaustive search -> no match -> gap logged

passFailCriteria.PASS: All discovery steps exhausted; no match found; gap logged to memory/capability-gaps.md; Type B creation queued or temporary fallback assigned
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Gap silently ignored; meta-theory self-executes; no evolution writeback

name: Multi-capability combination dispatch
input: Implement a REST API endpoint with auth, validation, and logging

passFailCriteria.PASS: Multiple capabilities discovered and combined; each sub-task mapped to specific capability; parallel dispatch where appropriate
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Single capability forced to handle all sub-tasks; capability mismatch

name: Priority ordering: Agent > Skill > MCP > Command
input: I need to secure the payment module

expectedDiscovery.scoring: 3=perfect -> direct invoke; 1-2=partial -> invoke with gap note; 0=no match -> gap

passFailCriteria.PASS: Capabilities discovered in priority order; highest-scoring capability dispatched; lower-priority considered as backup
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Lower-priority capability selected over higher-scoring one; priority ignored

name: Skill ROI calculation and filtering
input: Find me a testing skill — I need high coverage, frequent use

expectedDiscovery.method: ROI = (Task Coverage × Usage Frequency) / (Context Cost + Learning Curve)

passFailCriteria.PASS: ROI formula applied; python-testing selected (high coverage, high frequency, low cost); low-ROI skills excluded
passFailCriteria.FAIL: ROI not calculated; lowest-cost skill selected regardless of coverage; high-ROI skill ignored

name: Evolution writeback after capability gap
input: We keep needing blockchain security — this is the 4th time this month

expectedDiscovery.scoring: Evolution triggers Type B for recurring gap

passFailCriteria.PASS: Evolution detects recurring pattern; Type B creation triggered; blockchain-developer agent created and registered
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Gap repeatedly logged but never resolved; no Type B triggered

name: Fetch-first vs hardcoded name detection
input: Call meta-prism to review my code

passFailCriteria.PASS: Fetch-first search executed; meta-prism matched by capability (not hardcoded); dispatch follows
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Hardcoded name used without search; capability matching bypassed

name: Partial match with gap note
input: I need a data visualization agent — do we have one?

expectedDiscovery.method: score 1-2 = partial match with gap note

passFailCriteria.PASS: Partial match found (score 1-2); generalPurpose fallback used with gap note; capability gap documented
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Perfect match claimed for imperfect capability; gap ignored; wrong agent selected
